name: Houston Federal Credit Union
description_short: Houston Federal Credit Union is a Texas-based credit union offering checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards with competitive rates and member-focused services.
description_long: Houston Federal Credit Union (HFCU) is a federally chartered credit union headquartered in Texas serving members in Texas and South Carolina. The organization operates with a community-focused mission, positioning itself as a partner in members' financial journeys rather than solely a transactional financial institution. HFCU is regulated under the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) with NMLS # 673404 and routing number 313183368. The credit union has established itself as an alternative to traditional banks by emphasizing member benefits and personalized service. HFCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including personal checking and savings accounts, vehicle loans, mortgage financing, business loans, and Visa credit cards. Their online banking platform (eTeller) and mobile app provide 24/7 account access with enhanced security features. The credit union advertises competitive rates across products: auto loans as low as 4.25% APR, mortgages from 4.500% (4.716% APR), credit cards from 6.75% APR, and Certificate Account yields up to 3.80% APY. They currently promote a $250 cash back offer on vehicle loan financing and include unique benefits like zero-copay telehealth access through their 360 Secure Checking product. HFCU distinguishes itself through member-centric messaging emphasizing lower fees, personalized service, and community involvement. The website highlights customer testimonials praising staff members for being knowledgeable, thoughtful, and detail-oriented. The organization promotes financial wellness through free online education, financial counseling, and calculators. They report concrete member savings data (e.g., $232,688.89 in refinancing savings in February). The company actively recruits staff and maintains a careers page, suggesting organizational growth and stability. However, the website reveals a current service limitation: their TellerPhone balance-checking service (option 1) is unavailable, requiring members to use alternative options. The organization maintains Spanish-language accessibility on their website. HFCU represents a traditional credit union model focused on member service, competitive rates, and financial education rather than innovation or lending to subprime borrowers. They serve employed individuals and businesses seeking mainstream financial products at competitive rates. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Competitive auto loan rates as low as 4.25% APR with $250 cash back incentive
Mortgage rates starting at 4.500% (4.716% APY) with transparent pricing
Certificate accounts offering yields up to 3.80% APY, competitive for savings
24/7 eTeller online and mobile banking with enhanced security features
Free financial counseling and online financial education for members
Zero-copay telehealth access included with 360 Secure Checking accounts
Demonstrated member savings track record ($232,688.89 refinanced in one month)
Spanish-language website support and accessibility features
cons: TellerPhone automated balance-checking service (option 1) currently unavailable, limiting self-service options
Limited geographic footprint compared to national banks (Texas and South Carolina only)
Membership eligibility requirements not detailed on main website, potentially limiting access
No mention of small emergency lending products or payday loan alternatives on website
Credit card rates starting at 6.75% APR are not exceptionally competitive compared to premium card issuers
best_for: Texas and South Carolina residents seeking traditional banking services with member-focused service
Vehicle buyers and existing auto loan borrowers looking to refinance at competitive rates
Homebuyers seeking mortgage financing with transparent rates and personalized service
Members prioritizing financial education and free financial counseling services
diagnosis: Houston Federal Credit Union is best for employed individuals and families in Texas or South Carolina seeking mainstream financial products at competitive rates with personalized member service. The main caveat is that service limitations (currently unavailable TellerPhone option) and geographic restrictions may impact accessibility for some consumers, and rates, while competitive, are not exceptionally differentiated from larger financial institutions.
services: Certificate of Deposit (CD) accounts with yields up to 3.80% APY
Money Market accounts yielding up to 1.55% APY
Auto loans (new and used vehicles) at rates from 4.25% APR
Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinancing
Visa credit cards at rates from 6.75% APR
eTeller online banking platform with 24/7 access
Financial counseling and financial education resources
360 Secure Checking with zero-copay telehealth benefits
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Texas credit union offering checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards with competitive rates.
